jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at ProSport
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, ProSport in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ProSport:
ProSport is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
